creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 153019
Patch to update Fluxbox from 1.3.6 to 1.3.7

Changelog:
- Update to Fluxbox 1.3.7
- Remove patch for TextButton.cc cherry-picked to fix runtime crash prior to 1.3.7 release
- No longer patch generate_menu to add Chromium as upstream da285bcb introduces it but continue patching for 'linux-opera'
- Regen patches
